blocks.label: Episodic memory — current state, progress, fixes

systemRules: Always read AGENTS.md before starting any task
Read pre-task hooks in .opencode/hooks/pre-task.md before any implementation
Run post-task hooks in .opencode/hooks/post-task.md after any implementation
Update .opencode/memory/project.md with new changes after each session
Add new technical decisions to .opencode/memory/decisions.md with date and rationale
Never add comments to code unless asked
Server must use DB price/name, never trust client values
Use targeted file reads (line ranges) instead of full file reads when possible
One task per session — /clear between unrelated tasks
Keep sessions under 45 minutes or 40 turns — /clear after that
Monitor context: never exceed 40% of context window before compacting
If retrabalho > 30% (prompts corretivos / prompts totais), /clear and restart
Put critical instructions at START and END of prompt, not in the middle (Lost in the Middle principle)
Read hierarchical AGENTS.md if subdirectories have their own AGENTS.md

tester.description: Run tests against the running server

start.template: Start the CyberPDV server on port 3000 using 'npm start' and confirm it's accessible at http://localhost:3000.

test.template: Execute all available API tests against the running server. Check each endpoint: login (lord/invalido), produtos (list/categorias/get/create), vendas (criar pix 400/estoque), relatorios, impressao, usuarios, perfil. Report PASS/FAIL for each.

backup.template: Run .\checkpoint.ps1 -Descricao "[descricao do que foi feito]" to create a backup and register in checkpoints.md.

status.template: Read .opencode/memory/project.md and checkpoints.md. Then curl GET http://localhost:3000/api/produtos/1 to verify server is running. Report: server status, total products, last checkpoint, any blocked items.
